---
name: Student Setup Checklist
about: Pre-camp setup checklist for each student
title: "Setup: [YOUR NAME]"
labels: setup
---

## 🤖 Claude AI Account
- [ ] Create Claude account at claude.ai (parent creates for under-18)
- [ ] Paste Master Prompt into first conversation
- [ ] Send first message and verify Claude responds

## 🐙 GitHub Account
- [ ] Create GitHub account at github.com
- [ ] Add profile photo and bio
- [ ] Apply for GitHub Student Developer Pack (education.github.com/pack)
- [ ] Student Developer Pack approved (usually 1–3 days)
- [ ] Create Profile README (repo named same as your username)
- [ ] Accept invite to peninsula-aigp organization

## 💻 Software Installation
- [ ] Install Python 3.12+ from python.org (CHECK "Add Python to PATH")
- [ ] Install VS Code from code.visualstudio.com
- [ ] Install VS Code Python Extension (Extensions → search "Python" → Microsoft)
- [ ] Install GitHub Copilot Extension in VS Code (sign in with Student account)
- [ ] Install Git from git-scm.com
- [ ] Install GitHub Desktop from desktop.github.com

## 🖥️ Hardware Check
- [ ] Windows PC confirmed (required for simulator)
- [ ] Dedicated GPU: NVIDIA RTX 2060 Super+ or AMD equivalent
- [ ] 16 GB RAM minimum
- [ ] 60 GB free storage
- [ ] Verified: my computer meets all requirements

## 🏁 AI Grand Prix Registration
- [ ] Registered at theaigrandprix.com (under-14: parent registers)
- [ ] Assigned to a team (Alpha, Bravo, or Charlie)
- [ ] Parental consent form signed (if under 18)

## ✝ Camp Admin
- [ ] Camp registration form completed
- [ ] Tuition paid ($894 total or $749 early bird)
- [ ] Laptop confirmed for camp (meets hardware requirements)
- [ ] Parent received info email
